series_metadata.series_title: Family and Medical Leave Act (FMLA) Documents
series_metadata.series_description: All medical certification and related documents regarding employee''s and/or family member''s serious medical condition.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until converted to machine-readable or for one (1) year after separation ; Electronic: Retain for one (1) year after separation., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
